args.name: arguments
args.description: Human-readable host names, nameservers, types, or classes

name: -q
--query
options.description: Host name or IP address to query

name: -t
--type
options.description: Type of the DNS record being queried (A, MX, NS...)

name: -n
--nameserver
options.description: Address of the nameserver to send packets to

options.name: -class
options.description: Network class of the DNS record being queried (IN, CH, HS)

options.name: --edns
options.description: Whether to OPT in to EDNS (disable, hide, show)

options.name: --txid
options.description: Set the transaction ID to a specific value

options.name: -Z
options.description: Set uncommon protocol-level tweaks

name: -U
--udp
options.description: Use the DNS protocol over UDP

name: -T
--tcp
options.description: Use the DNS protocol over TCP

name: -S
--tls
options.description: Use the DNS-over-TLS protocol

name: -H
--https
options.description: Use the DNS-over-HTTPS protocol

name: --short
options.description: Short mode: display nothing but the first result

name: -J
--json
options.description: Display the output as JSON

options.name: --color
options.description: When to colourise the output (always, automatic, never)

args.name: arguments
args.description: Human-readable host names, nameservers, types, or classes

options.name: --seconds
options.description: Do not format durations, display them as seconds

options.name: --time
options.description: Print how long the response took to arrive
